info.title: Fittingz API Documentation
info.description:
REST API for fashion designers and tailoring businesses to manage clients, measurements, orders, and payments.

All endpoints require a Bearer token received from the `/api/v1/auth/login` endpoint (except authentication routes).

201.description: Registration successful. Verification code sent to email.

message.example: Registration successful. Please check your email for your verification code.

post.summary: Verify email address with a 4-digit code

code.description: 4-digit verification code sent to the email address

message.example: Email verified successfully. You can now log in.

423.description: Account locked due to too many failed attempts

200.description: Verification code sent or generic success if the account does not exist

400.description: This email address is already verified

post.summary: Send password reset code to email

200.description: Generic success response (reset code sent if account exists; email not found is not disclosed to prevent enumeration)

token.description: 4-digit reset code sent to the email address

post.summary: Reset user password using verified reset code

token.description: 4-digit reset code sent to the email address

post.summary: Logout user and revoke current token

get.summary: Get a paginated list of clients

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search by name, email, or phone

email.description: Must be unique. Either email or phone is required.

phone.description: Must be unique. Either phone or email is required.

get.summary: Get full client profile including measurement summary

revenue.description: Amounts keyed by currency code (e.g. NGN, USD)

get.summary: Get list of recently created orders
Get orders with outstanding balances, sorted by balance descending
Get orders due for delivery within a given number of days

parameters.name: days
parameters.description: Number of days ahead to look (default 7)

get.summary: Get pending or in-progress orders that have passed their due date
Get revenue analytics. Monthly period returns daily breakdown; yearly period returns monthly breakdown.

parameters.name: period
parameters.description: Time period: 'month' (daily breakdown of current month) or 'year' (monthly breakdown of current year)

day.description: Day of month (only present when period=month)

get.summary: Get top clients ranked by total amount spent

post.summary: Create new measurements for a client

fields.description: Key-value pairs of body parts and their measurements

is_default.description: Set as default measurement for this client

fields.description: Pass null for a key to remove it

422.description: Validation error including attempt to remove all measurements

patch.summary: Set a measurement profile as the client's default

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search by order number or style description

parameters.name: start_date
parameters.description: Filter orders created on or after date

parameters.name: end_date
parameters.description: Filter orders created on or before date

parameters.name: include
parameters.description: Comma-separated relations to include: measurement, styles

details.description: Free-form key-value details about the garment

due_date.description: Must be today or in the future

delivery_date.description: Must be on or after due date

deposit.description: Optional upfront deposit — recorded as an initial payment via cash

patch.summary: Link order to a measurement profile

post.summary: Attach a style to an order

delete.summary: Detach a style from an order

404.description: Order, style, or link not found

parameters.name: start_date
parameters.description: Filter payments on or after date

parameters.name: end_date
parameters.description: Filter payments on or before date

404.description: Client, order, or payment not found

amount.description: Cannot exceed the outstanding balance of the order

404.description: Client, order, or payment not found

422.description: Validation error including amount exceeding outstanding balance

404.description: Client, order, or payment not found
Client, order, or payment not found

get.summary: Get a paginated list of design styles

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search by title, description, or category

parameters.name: tag
parameters.description: Filter by tag (case-insensitive, matches any tag in the tags array)

image.description: Image file (jpeg, png, jpg, webp). Max size 5MB.

409.description: Cannot delete — style is linked to one or more orders

bearerAuth.description: Enter your bearer token to access protected endpoints.

tags.name: Authentication
tags.description: User authentication, registration, and account management
